name: Mosaic Calculator
seo_description: Mosaic Calculator. Area to cover, Mesh size — get Area with waste, Mesh sheets, Adhesive instantly for your flooring and tiling project. Includes waste.
example_label: Calculate mosaico over malla of 30×30cm to cubrir 8m² (típico to piscinas or baños).
result_context: To {area} m² se need {mallas_ud} mallas of mosaico of {tam_malla_cm}×{tam_malla_cm}cm ({m2_total} m²). Adhesivo: {adhesivo_kg} kg, Fragüe: {fragüe_kg} kg.
formula_display: Mallas = area ÷ (lado_m × lado_m); Adhesivo = area × 4 kg/m²
steps: Calculate adhesivo: 8m² × 4 kg/m² = 32 kg (adhesivo blanco to mosaico)
mistakes: No Use adhesivo blanco (puede transparentarse in mosaicos vítreos)
No limpiar The exceso of fragüe inmediatamente (se endurece)
No respetar time of curado antes of llenar pool
description: Mosaic Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Mosaic Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
